strengths: ETL/ELT and cloud data pipeline work
improvement_bullets: Standardized organizational KPIs, data governance, and metadata documentation, ensuring strict compliance with PI/PHI security standards while creating a single source of truth for business stakeholders.
Led inventory and data mapping initiatives for CRM and POS datasets, translating complex business requirements into structured data models and actionable user stories for technical sprints.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design data lineage documentation and quality validation workflows, mirroring the functional architecture required for enterprise-grade data cataloging.
Managed sensitive customer datasets by implementing robust validation rules, ensuring data integrity and secure handling of PII in accordance with internal privacy policies.
Architected data pipelines with a focus on 'Data-as-a-Product' principles, leveraging automated quality checks to ensure reliable, ready-to-consume datasets for downstream reporting and analytics.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Technical Data Analyst/Business Analyst opportunity with JSR Tech Consulting. I am interested in this opportunity because of JSR Tech Consulting’s reputation for driving innovation through robust data governance and its commitment to the Data-as-a-Product operating model. What interests me about working for JSR Tech Consulting is your approach to enterprise-wide data transformation, which inspires me because of my passion for building scalable, high-quality data products that empower stakeholders. I believe my expertise in SQL-based data modeling and my experience managing data quality frameworks would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing data integrity and clear documentation to bridge the gap between technical backends and business strategy. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a need for standardized KPIs and implemented a new data governance framework to resolve inconsistencies across disparate CRM and POS systems. This initiative resulted in a 40% improvement in reporting efficiency and ensured that all stakeholders relied on a consistent, trusted source of truth for decision-making. Ultimately, I know that the Technical Data Analyst/Business Analyst role at JSR Tech Consulting would allow me to bring my experience in data mapping and metadata management to support the People Domain Activation project. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my cross-functional collaboration skills within Agile environments. I worked closely with product managers to translate user feedback into production-ready code, reducing project delivery delays by 25% through iterative, requirements-driven development. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in data pipeline architecture in working on complex People-domain datasets at JSR Tech Consulting. I know that my analytical rigor and dedication to data standards align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
